Lore Item

AC: 13
CHA: +15
SV MAGIC: +20
Effect: Serpent Sight (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: HEAD
AC: 13
CHA: +15
SV MAGIC: +20

WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL

NPC Name

Nagafen's Lair


Uploaded April 12th, 2025 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
class dismissed
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2005 at 3:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341360172
16 posts
Ok, I'm somewhat bewildered by one thing: Doesnt anyone ever play or read up on other characters besides their own? Bards:need CHA to pull, mezz, charm..Enchanters:same as bards, CLERICS: ever hear the cry for the cleric to Pax? that takes cha! Ive told people that I was not going to Pax because at the time i had sorry charisma. Probably wouldnt hurt a Necro either. They have some charm capabilities, if memory serves...Dire Charm...Personally I would Not want this on my warrior. Unless hes selling of course, but if hes fighting I would rather have low cha since he will be more likely to hold aggro.
See what I'm saying? Dont dis an item for one class or another w/o first doing intensive research on that class. By that I mean, try reading every EQ book that has come out, front to back 20times.
▲ Page top
have one on my monk
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2003 at 11:02 AM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
126 posts
I have one of these on my monk. the ac is nice and the magic resist is very nice, but one huge bonus to many monks is the effect. humans cannot see well at all and to have a good item that also lets you see... well that increases its usfullness a great deal.

Should peeps be knocked out of roll if monk in group? Depends on the situation and the raid. But i agree, this is a nice item for bards and enchanters as well... but is funny to see the guy below saying how this is not a monk specific item and it should go to his bard or enc... heh, funny.
▲ Page top
RE: have one on my monk
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2004 at 4:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761168928
94 posts
imo this item is good for any Race with poor eyesight.

Got one on my Human Warrior, why: Good AC, Nice Effect and good Sv Magic
▲ Page top
Crazy
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2003 at 1:17 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767697482
View User Forum
14 posts
I think its crazy... I wear this thing an I'm a druid I think MR is great for ALL classes and the stigma thats attatched to items because of the weight just makes me wanna puke. There are more classes out there then monks for cryin out loud! And to cut other classes out of rolls because of this really bites.

▲ Page top
Why is this a monk item?
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2002 at 10:55 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252034299
Scholar
25 posts
Fisrt os all theese stats are GREAT for a bard. I was in solb the other day and people said only monks roll for it. after some discussion we agreed also bards roll for it. i said I pass cause i dont need it. I changed my mind rolled anyways and got 999 out of a 100 Lmao . and cause i said i passed i didint get it hehe.

Anyways this is a GREAT bard item considering we need cha and usualy dopnt have much str. cause we use plate and put pints in other stats we need more.
▲ Page top
RE: Why is this a monk item?
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2002 at 5:22 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591779385535
4 posts
all/all with 20 MR makes it good resist gear for any class so i think anyone should get to roll unless they can buff their own MR

Also, it's not a proc.. what are you gonna do? Headbut a mob to make it proc? It's a right click effect
▲ Page top
RE: proc?
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2002 at 4:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246364188
52 posts
Serpent Sight is a spell that allows Humans (and Erudites and Barbarians) to see with Infravision, the same vision every other race save Dark Elves see with. Very handy for non-casting classes of the human races.

I have one
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2001 at 6:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751447139
3 posts
I have one. Its a must for bards with the money. I mean the Cha boost is great for soloing and the Magic resist boost has saved me in more than a few duels, the serpent sight effect is nice too. Unfortunatly there is no graphic for this (looks like your not wearing anything)

Laenir Hardnote
lvl 27 Bard
Fennin Ro

# Mar 08 2002 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1649292544618
Scholar
92 posts
Most chanters aren't willing to take the -30 int hit that the jesters crown gives. By the time I'm done replacing my other cha gear with int gear to make up the difference, I'm not gaining much cha.
